title: Employment of clerks by jury commissioners
doc_html:
§3102.  Employment of clerks by jury commissioners

The jury commissioners for the parish of Orleans may employ one chief clerk at a salary of one hundred and fifty dollars per month, and two subpoena clerks at salaries of one hundred and twenty-five dollars per month each.
doc_text:
§3102.  Employment of clerks by jury commissioners
The jury commissioners for the parish of Orleans may employ one chief clerk at a salary of one hundred and fifty dollars per month, and two subpoena clerks at salaries of one hundred and twenty-five dollars per month each.
